##RRUFFID=R060379

##LOCALITY=Wessels mine, Kalahari Manganese Field, South Africa
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Michael Scott
##DESCRIPTION=Steel gray bed of parallel fibers
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R060379
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=(Na_0.60_K_0.28_Ca_0.12_)(Mn^4+^_7.40_Mn^2+^_0.44_Mg_0.11_Si_0.03_Al_0.02_)O_16_·2H_2_O
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Powder
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 9.97 b: 9.97 c: 2.8613 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 90 volume: 284.4 crystal system: tetragonal
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
